import hssm
import hssm.plotting
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import arviz as az
import seaborn as sns
from matplotlib import pyplot as plt
from scipy import stats
import os
from scipy.interpolate import UnivariateSpline
from datetime import date

BASE = '/Users/apar355/Desktop/translational_lab/AP_CPC2026_Poster_Supplement'

TRACE_DIR = '/Users/apar355/Desktop/translational_lab/AP_CPC2026_Poster_Supplement/trace_files_07.09'

DATA_PATH = '/Users/apar355/Desktop/translational_lab/AP_CPC2026_Poster_Supplement/hssm_ema_dfs_for_cluster/hssm_ema_df_pre.csv'
OUTPUT_PATH = '/Users/apar355/Desktop/translational_lab/AP_CPC2026_Poster_Supplement/post-model_outputs_cpc2026'
os.makedirs(OUTPUT_PATH, exist_ok=True)
print(os.path.exists(OUTPUT_PATH))

# Load PUNS data used to run the model
pair_pre = pd.read_csv(DATA_PATH)
pair_pre['subject'] = pair_pre['subject'].astype(str)  # make sure subject is string
pair_pre['choice'] = pair_pre['response'].map({-1: 0, 1: 1})

True

SCRIPT 4 -- INFERENCE AND POSTEROR PREDICTIVE CHECKS FOR CPC 2026¶

cpc_model.nc¶

In [9]:
ddm_samples_cpc_model = az.InferenceData.from_netcdf(f'{TRACE_DIR}/cpc_model.nc')
In [10]:

In [33]:
# SUBJ LEVEL TRACE PLOTS

axes = az.plot_trace(ddm_samples_cpc_model, var_names=[
'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed|subject',
'v_delta_valence:affect_z|subject',
'v_affect_z|subject',
'v_delta_valence|subject',
'v_1|subject'
])

fig = axes[0, 0].figure


plt.tight_layout()
plt.suptitle('Subject Level Traces', y=1.02)
plt.show()
fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/group_lvl_traces_cpc_model.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")
In [32]:
# GROUP LEVEL TRACE PLOTS



axes = az.plot_trace(ddm_samples_cpc_model, var_names=[
    'a', 
    't', 
    'z', 
    'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed', 
    'v_affect_z',
    'v_delta_valence', 
    'v_delta_valence:affect_z',
    'v_Intercept'])

fig = axes[0, 0].figure


plt.tight_layout()
plt.suptitle('Group Level Traces', y=1.02)
plt.show()
fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/group_lvl_traces_cpc_model.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")

    'v_1|subject',
    'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed|subject',
    'v_affect_z|subject',
    'v_delta_valence|subject',
    'v_delta_valence:affect_z|subject'])

In [14]:
# POSTERIOR PLOTS WITH ANNOTATIONS
label_map = {
    'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed': r'$(v: \beta_{\Delta self\text{-}belief})$',
    'v_affect_z': r'$(v: \beta_{affect})$',
    'v_delta_valence': r'$(v: \beta_{\Delta valence})$',
    'v_delta_valence:affect_z': r'$(v: \beta_{\Delta valence \times affect})$',
    'v_Intercept': r'$(v: \beta_{Intercept})$'
}

vars_of_interest = list(label_map.keys())

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, len(vars_of_interest), figsize=(4 * len(vars_of_interest), 3))
axes = axes.flatten()

for i, var in enumerate(vars_of_interest):
    az.plot_posterior(ddm_samples_cpc_model, var_names=[var], ax=axes[i],
                     hdi_prob=0.95, textsize=14, ref_val=0)
    axes[i].set_title(label_map[var], fontsize=14)

for ax in axes:
    for text in ax.texts:
        if '0.0% <0< 100.0%' in text.get_text() or '100.0% <0< 0.0%' in text.get_text():
            text.set_visible(False)
    ax.tick_params(axis='x', labelsize=12)
    ax.tick_params(axis='y', labelsize=12)

plt.suptitle('POSTERIORS FOR CPC 2026 POSTER (with annotations)', fontsize=16, y=1.05)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(f'{OUTPUT_PATH}/posterior_plots_with_orange_cpc2026.png', bbox_inches='tight', dpi=150)
plt.show()
In [15]:
# POSTERIOR PLOTS NO ANNOTATIONS
label_map = {
    'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed': r'$(v: \beta_{\Delta self\text{-}belief})$',
    'v_affect_z': r'$(v: \beta_{affect})$',
    'v_delta_valence': r'$(v: \beta_{\Delta valence})$',
    'v_delta_valence:affect_z': r'$(v: \beta_{\Delta valence \times affect})$',
    'v_Intercept': r'$(v: \beta_{Intercept})$'
}

vars_of_interest = list(label_map.keys())

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, len(vars_of_interest), figsize=(4 * len(vars_of_interest), 3))
axes = axes.flatten()

for i, var in enumerate(vars_of_interest):
    az.plot_posterior(ddm_samples_cpc_model, var_names=[var], ax=axes[i],
                     hdi_prob=0.95, textsize=14, ref_val=0)
    axes[i].set_title(label_map[var], fontsize=14)

for ax in axes:
    for text in ax.texts:
        if '<0<' in text.get_text():
            text.set_visible(False)
    ax.tick_params(axis='x', labelsize=12)
    ax.tick_params(axis='y', labelsize=12)

plt.suptitle('POSTERIORS FOR CPC 2026 POSTER ', fontsize=16, y=1.05)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(f'{OUTPUT_PATH}/posterior_plots_no_orange_cpc2026.png', bbox_inches='tight', dpi=150)
plt.show()

In [17]:
# (random and subject effects)

model = ddm_samples_cpc_model

# Random effects

# v_Intercept  
re_v_intercept = model.posterior['v_1|subject'].mean(dim=['chain', 'draw'])
re_v_intercept_df = re_v_intercept.to_series().reset_index()
re_v_intercept_df.columns = ['subject', 're_v_Intercept']

# v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed
re_v_dsb = model.posterior['v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed|subject'].mean(dim=['chain', 'draw'])
re_v_dsb_df = re_v_dsb.to_series().reset_index()
re_v_dsb_df.columns = ['subject', 're_v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed']

# v_affect_z
re_v_affect = model.posterior['v_affect_z|subject'].mean(dim=['chain', 'draw'])
re_v_affect_df = re_v_affect.to_series().reset_index()
re_v_affect_df.columns = ['subject', 're_v_affect_z']

# v_delta_valence
re_v_dv = model.posterior['v_delta_valence|subject'].mean(dim=['chain', 'draw'])
re_v_dv_df = re_v_dv.to_series().reset_index()
re_v_dv_df.columns = ['subject', 're_v_delta_valence']

# v_delta_valence:affect_z 
re_v_interaction = model.posterior['v_delta_valence:affect_z|subject'].mean(dim=['chain', 'draw'])
re_v_interaction_df = re_v_interaction.to_series().reset_index()
re_v_interaction_df.columns = ['subject', 're_v_delta_valence:affect_z']

random_effects_df = pd.merge(re_v_intercept_df, re_v_dsb_df, on='subject', how='inner')
random_effects_df = pd.merge(random_effects_df, re_v_affect_df, on='subject', how='inner')
random_effects_df = pd.merge(random_effects_df, re_v_dv_df, on='subject', how='inner')
random_effects_df = pd.merge(random_effects_df, re_v_interaction_df, on='subject', how='inner')

# Fixed effects
fixed_effects_df = az.summary(model, var_names=[
    't', 'z', 'a',
    'v_Intercept',
    'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed',
    'v_affect_z',
    'v_delta_valence',
    'v_delta_valence:affect_z'
])
new_fixed_effects_df = fixed_effects_df['mean'].T.to_frame().T
new_fixed_effects_df.columns = fixed_effects_df.index

# Subject effects = fixed + random 
subject_effects_full_df = random_effects_df.copy()

subject_effects_full_df['re_v_Intercept'] = (
    subject_effects_full_df['re_v_Intercept']
    + new_fixed_effects_df['v_Intercept'].values[0]
)
subject_effects_full_df['re_v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed'] = (
    subject_effects_full_df['re_v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed']
    + new_fixed_effects_df['v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed'].values[0]
)
subject_effects_full_df['re_v_affect_z'] = (
    subject_effects_full_df['re_v_affect_z']
    + new_fixed_effects_df['v_affect_z'].values[0]
)
subject_effects_full_df['re_v_delta_valence'] = (
    subject_effects_full_df['re_v_delta_valence']
    + new_fixed_effects_df['v_delta_valence'].values[0]
)
subject_effects_full_df['re_v_delta_valence:affect_z'] = (
    subject_effects_full_df['re_v_delta_valence:affect_z']
    + new_fixed_effects_df['v_delta_valence:affect_z'].values[0]
)

subject_effects_full_df['z'] = new_fixed_effects_df['z'].values[0]
subject_effects_full_df['t'] = new_fixed_effects_df['t'].values[0]
subject_effects_full_df['a'] = new_fixed_effects_df['a'].values[0]

subject_effects_full_df = subject_effects_full_df.rename(columns={
    're_v_Intercept': 'v_Intercept',
    're_v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed': 'v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed',
    're_v_affect_z': 'v_affect_z',
    're_v_delta_valence': 'v_delta_valence',
    're_v_delta_valence:affect_z': 'v_delta_valence:affect_z'
})
subject_effects_full_df['subject'] = subject_effects_full_df['subject'].astype(str)

subject_effects_full_df

In [20]:
# Simulate data from full model 
n_sims = 100
pair_data = pd.merge(pair_pre, subject_effects_full_df, on='subject', how='inner')

v_trial_wise = (
    pair_data['v_Intercept']
    + pair_data['v_delta_sb_within_subj_normed'] * pair_data['delta_sb_within_subj_normed']
    + pair_data['v_affect_z'] * pair_data['affect_z']
    + pair_data['v_delta_valence'] * pair_data['delta_valence']
    + pair_data['v_delta_valence:affect_z'] * (pair_data['delta_valence'] * pair_data['affect_z'])
)

a_est = pair_data['a'].values[0]
z_est = pair_data['z'].values[0]
t_est = pair_data['t'].values[0]
v_est = v_trial_wise.values

sim_data_full = hssm.simulate_data(
    model='ddm',
    theta=dict(v=v_est, 
               a=a_est, 
               z=z_est, 
               t=t_est),
    size=n_sims,
)

sim_data_full['subject'] = np.tile(pair_data['subject'].values, n_sims)
sim_data_full['sim_num'] = np.repeat(np.arange(1, n_sims + 1), pair_data.shape[0])
sim_data_full.rename(columns={'rt': 'pred_rt', 'response': 'pred_response'}, inplace=True)
sim_data_full['delta_sb_within_subj_normed'] = np.tile(pair_data['delta_sb_within_subj_normed'].values, n_sims)
#sim_data_full['delta_sb_within_subj_normed_bin_11'] = np.tile(pair_data['delta_sb_within_subj_normed_bin_11'].values, n_sims)
sim_data_full['delta_valence'] = np.tile(pair_data['delta_valence'].values, n_sims)
sim_data_full['affect_z'] = np.tile(pair_data['affect_z'].values, n_sims)
sim_data_full['pred_choice'] = np.where(sim_data_full['pred_response'] == -1, 0, 1)

pair_data_full = pair_data

                         ['delta_sb_within_subj_normed', 'delta_valence', 'affect_z']]

In [22]:
# Plot predicted (spline) and observed 

pair_data_full['rt_s'] = pair_data_full['rt'] / 1000
pair_data_full['dsb_bin'] = pair_data_full['delta_sb_within_subj_normed'].round(1)

sim_data_full['pred_rt_s'] = sim_data_full['pred_rt']
sim_data_full['dsb_bin'] = sim_data_full['delta_sb_within_subj_normed'].round(1)

obs_rt_subj_full = (pair_data_full
    .groupby(['subject', 'dsb_bin'], as_index=False, observed=True)['rt_s'].median())
obs_rt_full = obs_rt_subj_full.groupby('dsb_bin', observed=True)['rt_s'].agg(
    mean='mean', se=lambda x: x.std(ddof=1) / np.sqrt(x.count())
).reset_index()

obs_choice_subj_full = (pair_data_full
    .groupby(['subject', 'dsb_bin'], as_index=False, observed=True)['choice'].mean())
obs_choice_full = obs_choice_subj_full.groupby('dsb_bin', observed=True)['choice'].agg(
    mean='mean', se=lambda x: x.std(ddof=1) / np.sqrt(x.count())
).reset_index()

pred_rt_subj_full = (sim_data_full
    .groupby(['subject', 'dsb_bin', 'sim_num'], as_index=False, observed=True)['pred_rt_s'].median())
pred_rt_bin_full = pred_rt_subj_full.groupby(
    ['dsb_bin', 'sim_num'], as_index=False, observed=True)['pred_rt_s'].mean()
pred_rt_full = pred_rt_bin_full.groupby('dsb_bin', observed=True)['pred_rt_s'].agg(
    pred_mean='mean',
    lower_2_5=lambda x: x.quantile(0.025),
    upper_97_5=lambda x: x.quantile(0.975)
).reset_index()
merged_rt_full = pd.merge(pred_rt_full, obs_rt_full, on='dsb_bin', how='inner')

pred_choice_subj_full = (sim_data_full
    .groupby(['subject', 'dsb_bin', 'sim_num'], as_index=False, observed=True)['pred_choice'].mean())
pred_choice_bin_full = pred_choice_subj_full.groupby(
    ['dsb_bin', 'sim_num'], as_index=False, observed=True)['pred_choice'].mean()
pred_choice_full = pred_choice_bin_full.groupby('dsb_bin', observed=True)['pred_choice'].agg(
    pred_mean='mean',
    lower_2_5=lambda x: x.quantile(0.025),
    upper_97_5=lambda x: x.quantile(0.975)
).reset_index()
merged_choice_full = pd.merge(pred_choice_full, obs_choice_full, on='dsb_bin', how='inner')

rt_mse_full = np.mean((merged_rt_full['mean'] - merged_rt_full['pred_mean'])**2)
choice_mse_full = np.mean((merged_choice_full['mean'] - merged_choice_full['pred_mean'])**2)
print(f"[full] RT MSE: {rt_mse_full:.6f}")
print(f"[full] Choice MSE: {choice_mse_full:.6f}")

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(8, 12), sharex=True)
s_val = 1.0

df_c = merged_choice_full.sort_values('dsb_bin').dropna(subset=['dsb_bin', 'pred_mean'])
xc = df_c['dsb_bin'].to_numpy()
yc = df_c['pred_mean'].to_numpy()
spl_c = UnivariateSpline(xc, yc, k=3, s=s_val)
xc_grid = np.linspace(xc.min(), xc.max(), 600)
yc_grid = spl_c(xc_grid)

axes[0].errorbar(xc, df_c['mean'], yerr=df_c['se'],
                 fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                 markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[0].plot(xc_grid, yc_grid, color='#fdae6b', linewidth=2, label='Model Predictions')
axes[0].set_ylabel('P(Chose Right-side word)', fontsize=26)
axes[0].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[0].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[0].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])
axes[0].set_ylim(0, 1)

df_r = merged_rt_full.sort_values('dsb_bin').dropna(subset=['dsb_bin', 'pred_mean'])
xr = df_r['dsb_bin'].to_numpy()
yr = df_r['pred_mean'].to_numpy()
spl_r = UnivariateSpline(xr, yr, k=3, s=s_val)
xr_grid = np.linspace(xr.min(), xr.max(), 600)
yr_grid = spl_r(xr_grid)

axes[1].errorbar(xr, df_r['mean'], yerr=df_r['se'],
                 fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                 markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[1].plot(xr_grid, yr_grid, color='#fdae6b', linewidth=2, label='Model Predictions')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Δ Self-Belief (Right-side word − Left-side word)', fontsize=20)
axes[1].set_ylabel('Reaction Time (s)', fontsize=24)
axes[1].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[1].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[1].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])

plt.tight_layout()
#fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/observed_pred_spline_ssplots_cpc_model.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")
#fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/observed_pred_spline_ssplots_cpc2026.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")

plt.show()

[full] RT MSE: 0.008606
[full] Choice MSE: 0.000570

# Export Processed df 

# define folder 
processed_folder = f"../processed_data"
# make it if dont exist
os.makedirs(processed_folder, exist_ok=True)

# export the dfs used to make plot (obs mean/se + pred mean/quantiles per dsb bin)
merged_rt_full.to_csv(
    os.path.join(processed_folder, f"merged_rt_full.csv"),
    index=False)
merged_choice_full.to_csv(
    os.path.join(processed_folder, f"merged_choice_full.csv"),
    index=False)

# Plot predicted v observed (points)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(8, 12), sharex=True)

df_c = merged_choice_full.sort_values('dsb_bin').dropna(subset=['dsb_bin', 'pred_mean'])
pred_err_c = np.array([df_c['pred_mean'] - df_c['lower_2_5'],
                       df_c['upper_97_5'] - df_c['pred_mean']])

axes[0].errorbar(df_c['dsb_bin'], df_c['mean'], yerr=df_c['se'],
                 fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                 markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[0].errorbar(df_c['dsb_bin'], df_c['pred_mean'], yerr=pred_err_c,
                 fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#1F77B4', ecolor='#1F77B4',
                 markersize=12, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Predicted')
axes[0].set_ylabel('P(Choose Right)', fontsize=26)
axes[0].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[0].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[0].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])
axes[0].set_ylim(0, 1)
axes[0].legend(fontsize=18)

df_r = merged_rt_full.sort_values('dsb_bin').dropna(subset=['dsb_bin', 'pred_mean'])
pred_err_r = np.array([df_r['pred_mean'] - df_r['lower_2_5'],
                       df_r['upper_97_5'] - df_r['pred_mean']])

axes[1].errorbar(df_r['dsb_bin'], df_r['mean'], yerr=df_r['se'],
                 fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                 markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[1].errorbar(df_r['dsb_bin'], df_r['pred_mean'], yerr=pred_err_r,
                 fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#1F77B4', ecolor='#1F77B4',
                 markersize=12, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Predicted')
axes[1].set_xlabel(r'$\Delta$ Self-Belief (Right − Left)', fontsize=26)
axes[1].set_ylabel('Reaction Time (s)', fontsize=26)
axes[1].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[1].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[1].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])
axes[1].legend(fontsize=18)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.suptitle('PRED v OBSERVED CHOICE AND RT BY DSB (N=26) )', fontsize=16, y=1.05)
#fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/observed_pred_points_ssplots_cpc_model.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")
#fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/observed_pred_points_ssplots_cpc.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")

plt.show()
In [26]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 12), sharex=True)
s_val = 1.0

# ===== LEFT COLUMN: spline =====

# --- Choice (top-left) ---
df_c = merged_choice_full.sort_values('dsb_bin').dropna(subset=['dsb_bin', 'pred_mean'])
xc = df_c['dsb_bin'].to_numpy()
yc = df_c['pred_mean'].to_numpy()
spl_c = UnivariateSpline(xc, yc, k=3, s=s_val)
xc_grid = np.linspace(xc.min(), xc.max(), 600)
yc_grid = spl_c(xc_grid)

axes[0, 0].errorbar(xc, df_c['mean'], yerr=df_c['se'],
                    fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                    markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[0, 0].plot(xc_grid, yc_grid, color='#fdae6b', linewidth=2, label='Model Predictions')
axes[0, 0].set_ylabel('P(Choose Right)', fontsize=26)
axes[0, 0].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[0, 0].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[0, 0].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])
axes[0, 0].set_ylim(0, 1)

# --- RT (bottom-left) ---
df_r = merged_rt_full.sort_values('dsb_bin').dropna(subset=['dsb_bin', 'pred_mean'])
xr = df_r['dsb_bin'].to_numpy()
yr = df_r['pred_mean'].to_numpy()
spl_r = UnivariateSpline(xr, yr, k=3, s=s_val)
xr_grid = np.linspace(xr.min(), xr.max(), 600)
yr_grid = spl_r(xr_grid)

axes[1, 0].errorbar(xr, df_r['mean'], yerr=df_r['se'],
                    fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                    markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[1, 0].plot(xr_grid, yr_grid, color='#fdae6b', linewidth=2, label='Model Predictions')
axes[1, 0].set_xlabel(r'$\Delta$ Self-Belief (Right − Left)', fontsize=26)
axes[1, 0].set_ylabel('Reaction Time (s)', fontsize=26)
axes[1, 0].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[1, 0].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[1, 0].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])

# ===== RIGHT COLUMN: points =====

# --- Choice (top-right) ---
pred_err_c = np.array([df_c['pred_mean'] - df_c['lower_2_5'],
                       df_c['upper_97_5'] - df_c['pred_mean']])

axes[0, 1].errorbar(df_c['dsb_bin'], df_c['mean'], yerr=df_c['se'],
                    fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                    markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[0, 1].errorbar(df_c['dsb_bin'], df_c['pred_mean'], yerr=pred_err_c,
                    fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#1F77B4', ecolor='#1F77B4',
                    markersize=12, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Predicted')
axes[0, 1].set_ylabel('P(Choose Right)', fontsize=26)
axes[0, 1].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[0, 1].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[0, 1].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])
axes[0, 1].set_ylim(0, 1)
axes[0, 1].legend(fontsize=18)

# --- RT (bottom-right) ---
pred_err_r = np.array([df_r['pred_mean'] - df_r['lower_2_5'],
                       df_r['upper_97_5'] - df_r['pred_mean']])

axes[1, 1].errorbar(df_r['dsb_bin'], df_r['mean'], yerr=df_r['se'],
                    fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#FF7F0E', ecolor='#FF7F0E',
                    markersize=14, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Observed')
axes[1, 1].errorbar(df_r['dsb_bin'], df_r['pred_mean'], yerr=pred_err_r,
                    fmt='o', capsize=5, color='#1F77B4', ecolor='#1F77B4',
                    markersize=12, elinewidth=2, markeredgewidth=0, label='Predicted')
axes[1, 1].set_xlabel(r'$\Delta$ Self-Belief (Right − Left)', fontsize=26)
axes[1, 1].set_ylabel('Reaction Time (s)', fontsize=26)
axes[1, 1].tick_params(axis='both', labelsize=26)
axes[1, 1].set_xticks([-0.5, 0, 0.5])
axes[1, 1].set_xticklabels(['-0.5', '0', '0.5'])
axes[1, 1].legend(fontsize=18)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.suptitle('PRED v OBSERVED CHOICE AND RT BY DSB (N=26)', fontsize=16, y=1.02)
fig.savefig(f"{OUTPUT_PATH}/observed_pred_spline_and_points_ssplots_cpc.png",
            dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()
